column2: A major "Boss Scam" hit an Indian firm, resulting in a ₹10.4 crore loss after an employee followed fake orders sent over WhatsApp. Fraudsters impersonated the company's senior executives, directing staff to transfer immediate funds for "regulatory requirements." The ruse was only discovered when the worker contacted the executives directly.
